Mech It Easy STEM Kits

High-quality, reusable engineering kits designed and manufactured in Nepal. Every kit comes with all components needed for complete classroom experimentation.

View Details
Mech It Easy Kit

Hand Crank Generator STEM Kit (Grade 9–10 Focus)

Master the fundamental principle of electromagnetism through mechanical energy conversion.

A versatile kit designed for school laboratories to illustrate how motors and generators operate on the same basic principle through hands-on experimentation.

Reusable, classroom-tested components.Designed for both light and dark themes.
Details
View Details
Mech It Easy Kit

Math Exploration Kit (Grade 8–10 Focus)

Master linear equations and trigonometry through physical manipulation of slopes, intercepts, and unit circles.

This kit transforms abstract algebraic concepts and trigonometric functions into tangible models, helping students visualize mathematical behavior in real-time.

Reusable, classroom-tested components.Designed for both light and dark themes.
Details
Coming SoonClick to suggest a kit
Mech It Easy Kit

New advanced kits focusing on complex mechanical systems and industrial fluid power applications.

We're currently perfecting our next series of kits. These will include modular pulley systems for deeper physics exploration and advanced hydraulic models.

Reusable, classroom-tested components.Designed for both light and dark themes.
Mech It Easy

Hands-on STEM kits, built for Nepal's classrooms. Empowering the next generation of engineers through hand-on experimentation.
